All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

A

action - Variable in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
The field for the action record component.
action() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
Returns the value of the action record component.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
actionPerfomed is a method that responds to an event and assigns a reaction tied to it based on command texts.
addButtons(JPanel) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
addButtons is a method that adds the buttons to the left JPanel.
addRunButtonListener(ActionListener) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
addRunButtonListener is a method that adds an Action Listener to the View.runButton.

C

call(String) - Method in interface pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.ExceptionLambda
call method returns and throws an exception instance of type V with the message.
cipher() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.controller.Controller
cipher is a method that is tied to the View.runButton.
Controller - Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.controller
A class containing one method that controls the cipher program, calling appropriate methods to conduct Rail Fence cipher, It also uses @Getter from Lombok.
Controller(View, Model) - Constructor for class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.controller.Controller
Initiates a Controller object.
createAndShowGUI() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
createAndShowGUI is a method that creates the JFrame frame and builds it alongside the JPanel.
createMenuBar() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
createMenuBar is a method that creates a JMenuBar, expands it and returns it.
createSplitPane() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
createSplitPane is a method that creates a JSplitPane, expands it greatly, adding many JPanels and a separate JSplitPane, and then returns it.

D

decode() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.Model
Method decoding the text according to the number of rails.
displayResult(String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
displayResult is a method that displays the action performed by the user.

E

encode() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.Model
Method encoding the text according to the number of rails.
equals(Object) - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
ExceptionLambda<V,E> - Interface in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model
ExceptionLambda is a functional interface (has one method) used for creation of lambdas; It allows to throw any exceptions that extend Exception.

G

getMode() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
getMode is a method that reads from the View.modeBox the selected option and based on it, returns the cipher mode.
getRails() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
getRails is a method that reads the number of rails from the View.railsField and returns the integer value.
getTextInput() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
getTextInput is a method that reads the text input from View.textField.

H

hashCode() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
Returns a hash code value for this object.

I

IncorrectNoOfRailsException - Exception Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model
A derived exception class for errors relating to the number of rails.
IncorrectNoOfRailsException() - Constructor for exception class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.IncorrectNoOfRailsException
Initiates a IncorrectNoOfRailsException object.
IncorrectNoOfRailsException(String) - Constructor for exception class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.IncorrectNoOfRailsException
Initiates a IncorrectNoOfRailsException object.
inputText - Variable in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
The field for the inputText record component.
inputText() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
Returns the value of the inputText record component.

L

logArea - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
logArea is located on the bottom of the window and it prints out all the history of performed actions.
LogEntry - Record Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model
LogEntry record is a record that will hold all history.
LogEntry(String, String, int, String, String) - Constructor for record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
Creates an instance of a LogEntry record class.
logTableModel - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
logTableModel is an implementation of TableModel that uses a Vector of Vectors to store the cell value objects.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.controller.Controller
Main method that reads the console line arguments or asks the user for them, conducting the Rail Fence cipher accordingly to those arguments.
MENU_OPTION1 - Static variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
MENU_OPTION1 is a command text set for the first menu option.
MENU_OPTION2 - Static variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
MENU_OPTION2 is a command text set for the second menu option.
mode - Variable in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
The field for the mode record component.
mode() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
Returns the value of the mode record component.
MODE - Static variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
MODE is a command text set for View.modeBox.
modeBox - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
modeBox contains two options, Encryption and Decryption and is allows for selecting the mode.
model - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.controller.Controller
model - an instance of Model class, conducts the Rail Fence cipher.
Model - Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model
A class that realizes the Rail Fence cipher, This class contains many methods and uses @Getter from Lombok.
Model() - Constructor for class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.Model
Initiates a Model object and assigns a View class to it.
modeSelect - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.Model
modeSelect - either en - encoding or de - decoding.

N

noOfRails - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.Model
the number of rails needed for the cipher.
NUM_ENTERED - Static variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
NUM_ENTERED is a command text set for View.railsField.

O

onMenuOption1Selected(ActionEvent) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
onMenuOption1Selected is a method that responds to an event and is called for the first menu option.
onMenuOption2Selected(ActionEvent) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
onMenuOption2Selected is a method that responds to an event and is called for the second menu option.
onModeSelected(ActionEvent) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
onModeSelected is a method that responds to an event and is called for the View.modeBox.
onNumberEntered(ActionEvent) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
onNumberEntered is a method that responds to an event and is called for the View.railsField.
onRunButtonPressed(ActionEvent) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
onRunButtonPressed is a method that responds to an event and is called for the View.runButton.
onTextEntered(ActionEvent) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
onTextEntered is a method that responds to an event and is called for the View.textField.
outputArea - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
outputArea is located on the right side of the window and it shows the output of the cipher.

P

pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.controller - package pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.controller
Contains pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.controller class.
pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model - package pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model
Contains Model class, IncorrectNoOfRailsException exception class, LogEntry record and ExceptionLambda functional interface.
pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view - package pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view
Contains pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view class that handles the GUI.

R

railFence() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.Model
Method managing the Rail Fence cipher according to the mode.
rails - Variable in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
The field for the rails record component.
rails() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
Returns the value of the rails record component.
railsField - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
railsField field is for reading the number of rails information from the user.
result - Variable in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
The field for the result record component.
result() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
Returns the value of the result record component.
RUN - Static variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
RUN is a command text set for View.runButton.
runButton - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
runButton runs the algorithm.

S

setLabelForComponent(JComponent, JLabel) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
setLabelForComponent is a method that sets the label above the component.
setMode(String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.Model
Method setting the mode needed for the cipher and checking the validity.
setNoOfRails(int) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.Model
Method setting the number of rails for the Rail Fence cipher, checking for its validity.
setResult(String, String, int, String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
setResult is a method that prints out to the View.outputArea and View.logArea the result of the cipher.
setSplitPaneOptions(JSplitPane) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
setSplitPaneOptions is a method that sets the options for JSplitPane component to make it look and behave better.
setText(String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.Model
Method setting the text for the cipher.
showError(String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
showError is a method that via a JOptionPane shows a message dialog informing the user of an error.

T

TEXT_ENTERED - Static variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
TEXT_ENTERED is a command text set for View.textField.
textCipher - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.Model
textCipher - the text to either encode or decode.
textField - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
textField field is for reading the text from the user.
toString() - Method in record class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.LogEntry
Returns a string representation of this record class.

V

view - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.controller.Controller
view - an instance of a View class needed for the GUI and input/output.
View - Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view
A class containing many methods that create the GUI and read/write information from/to the user and uses @Getter from Lombok.
View() - Constructor for class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.view.View
Initiates a View object.
